name: mcp-memory-keeper
description: Configure and validate MCP Memory Keeper integration with Codex CLI.

decisions.decision: Use npx invocation for memory-keeper MCP server in Codex config.
decisions.reasoning: npx-based setup is portable and aligns with upstream README examples, reducing dependency on local repo path/launcher location.
decisions.impact: Codex can resolve and run memory-keeper without hardcoded local script paths.

decisions.decision: Use local built entrypoint for Memory Keeper in Codex instead of npx.
decisions.reasoning: Codex logs showed MCP startup timeout with `npx mcp-memory-keeper` under a 10s startup window; direct `node dist/index.js` removes npx/package resolution overhead.
decisions.impact: Memory Keeper should initialize within timeout and expose tools in Codex MCP tool list after session restart.

notes.content: Updated Codex user config at ~/.codex/config.toml to use npx-based Memory Keeper MCP server: [mcp_servers.memory-keeper] command="npx", args=["mcp-memory-keeper"]. Replaced prior local launcher.sh command. User should restart Codex session to load updated MCP server.

Built mcp-memory-keeper locally (`npm install && npm run build`) and changed Codex MCP config to launch local server directly: [mcp_servers.memory-keeper] command="node", args=["/Volumes/Data/_ai/_mcp/mcp_stuff/mcp-memory-keeper/dist/index.js"]. This avoids npx startup timeout during Codex MCP initialization.

Updated README.md to include complete 38-tool catalog with one-line usage descriptions, added missing usage examples for context_search_all/context_diff/context_list_channels/context_channel_stats, and updated Current Features header version to v0.12.0. Verified all 38 tools are now mentioned and have at least one usage example in README.

Performed consistency sweep for EXAMPLES.md and API.md against 38-memory-keeper tool list. Added EXAMPLES section for context_set_project_dir/context_diff/context_list_channels/context_channel_stats and TOC entry. Added API sections for context_set_project_dir, context_status, context_prepare_compaction, context_git_commit; added Git & Compaction TOC entry; marked context_delete as legacy with context_batch_delete recommendation. Re-verified all 38 tools are now mentioned in README.md, EXAMPLES.md, and API.md.

Performed parameter-accuracy sweep against src/index.ts input schemas. Fixed outdated params in API.md and EXAMPLES.md (session_list filters removed, save priority enum corrected, watch pollTimeout usage, removed deprecated export/import params like includeStats/sessionIds/outputPath/mergeStrategy, updated search examples to use context_search_all + category, corrected git_commit message requirement, and aligned channel_stats params to includeTimeSeries/includeInsights/sessionId/channel).

README.md parameter-accuracy pass completed against src/index.ts schemas. Fixed invalid context_get priority filter to priorities array, replaced context_delegate analysisResults with insights, corrected timeline relativeTime boolean to natural-language string, and changed compress preserveCategories example from decision/critical to decision/warning.

Configured both Codex and Claude memory-keeper servers to use shared data dir /Volumes/Data/_ai/_mcp/mcp-data/memory-keeper by wrapping startup in bash -lc with cd to target directory and exec node dist/index.js. Migrated current DB from ~/mcp-data/memory-keeper (newer) to shared dir and created timestamped backups in source/target directories. Claude user-scope memory-keeper now reports connected with new command.

Implemented shared-DB coordination conventions inside memory-keeper DB at /Volumes/Data/_ai/_mcp/mcp-data/memory-keeper: created sessions codex-main and claude-main with matching default channels, and saved shared keys in channel shared-conventions (shared:working-agreement and shared:working-agreement-ref) to guide cross-tool usage and minimize conflicts.

README.md updated with enhancements: clarified default storage behavior for npx/launcher vs direct node, added Codex CLI setup section, added shared DB setup for Claude+Codex using /Volumes/Data/_ai/_mcp/mcp-data/memory-keeper, included verification commands (claude mcp get, ps/lsof), and added multi-client conventions to reduce logical conflicts when both tools write to the same DB.

Added README migration subsection under shared DB setup: safe backup-and-copy commands to consolidate existing Claude/Codex context.db files into shared path, plus optional SQLite row-count verification snippet.
Added rollback instructions to README migration section: restore context.db/context.db-wal/context.db-shm from timestamped .bak files and restart Claude/Codex sessions after rollback.

Configured user-scope efficiency defaults for both Claude and Codex: memory-keeper and mcp-project-context now run via stable bash/node commands and both set TOOL_PROFILE=standard. Verified with `claude mcp get` and `codex mcp get` that both servers are connected and env profile is active.
